subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the eight letters
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Sovereign, the Most Holy, the Source of Peace, the Faithful, the Guardian, the Mighty, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو الملک القدوس السلام المؤمن المهیمن العزیز الجبار
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
